gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; at these booths, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; at these booths, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; also, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards.

Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students also clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards.

Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and at these booths, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
